theme_and_archetype.description: Earthy, trustworthy, and highly accessible agricultural feel. Designed for low digital literacy with extreme visual clarity, large touch targets, and high contrast.

pulsating_mic.layout: Centered horizontally at the top/middle of the screen.
pulsating_mic.styles: Large circular button (minWidth 120, minHeight 120, borderRadius 60). Use React Native Animated for pulsing rings expanding outwards. backgroundColor: mic_primary.

feature_grid.layout: 2 columns x 3 rows grid below the mic button.
feature_grid.styles: Flex container with flexDirection: 'row', flexWrap: 'wrap', justifyContent: 'space-between'. Card width: 47%, height: 140, padding: 16, borderRadius: 16, alignItems: 'center', justifyContent: 'center'.

language_selector.layout: Positioned clearly above or next to the mic button.
language_selector.styles: Pill-shaped toggle or simple horizontal ScrollView with high-contrast text tags. Selected state is bold with colored background.

accessibility_and_testing.touch_targets: All touchable elements MUST have a minimum height and width of 56px to accommodate coarse interaction (low digital literacy, gloved or calloused hands).
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Every TouchableOpacity, TextInput, and Button MUST have a 'testID' attribute (in React Native use testID instead of data-testid, although data-testid can be passed for web contexts, stick to standard RN testID).
accessibility_and_testing.voice_output: Integrate Expo Speech for reading out text responses automatically.
